# STRING Database Integration

## 4.1 Introduction

STRING database integrates multiple interaction sources:

* Experimental
* Computational
* Literature

---

## 4.2 Mapping Genes

```{r}
library(STRINGdb)

string_db <- STRINGdb$new(version="11.5", species=9606)
```

---

## 4.3 Core Network

* Contains only query genes

---

## 4.4 Extended Network

* Includes interacting partners

---

## 4.5 Filtering

```{r}
score_cutoff <- 700
```

---

## 📌 Suggested Figures

* STRING interface screenshot
* Core vs extended network
